enchantment.addons.action_sound.kizuna_a: Equip on helmet to produce cute sounds for many actions!
enchantment.addons.action_sound.kotonoha: Equip on helmet to produce cute sounds for many actions!
Equip on helmet to produce cute sounds for many actions!
enchantment.addons.action_sound.yuzuki_y: Equip on helmet to produce cute sounds for many actions!
enchantment.addons.auto_repair.lore.0: Restores 5% of lost durability every 3 ~ 1 seconds,
enchantment.addons.auto_repair.lore.2: only triggers while held or equipped.
enchantment.addons.bloodsucking.lore.0: 4 ~ 10% of melee damage dealt is converted into health.
enchantment.addons.break_recovery.lore.0: Immediately restores all durability when the item breaks,
enchantment.addons.break_recovery.lore.1: this enchantment is removed after it triggers.
enchantment.addons.buoyancy.lore.0: Reduces gravity by 30 ~ 60% when equipped on elytra.
Axe has an 8 ~ 20% chance to deal 200% damage,
cannot trigger while under the weakness effect.
enchantment.addons.delicacy.lore.0: When equipped on helmet, eating food increases hunger by 20 ~ 30%,
enchantment.addons.delicacy.lore.1: cannot trigger while under the hunger effect.
enchantment.addons.eternal.lore.0: Dropped items will not despawn naturally,
enchantment.addons.eternal.lore.1: and will not be destroyed by most damage sources.
enchantment.addons.extension.lore.0: Tool block interaction range increased by 1 ~ 2 blocks.
enchantment.addons.frozen.lore.0: Freezes the target after a melee attack,
enchantment.addons.frozen.lore.1: higher levels result in longer duration.
enchantment.addons.gale.lore.0: Firework acceleration during elytra flight is extended by 20 ~ 40%.
enchantment.addons.giganticize.lore.0: Increases body size by 15 ~ 30% when worn,
enchantment.addons.gravity.lore.0: Increases gravity by 40 ~ 100% when equipped on chestplate.
enchantment.addons.infinite_durability.l: Durability is never consumed under any circumstances.
Reduces knockback received by 4 ~ 8% when worn,
full set reduces knockback by 16 ~ 32% total.
enchantment.addons.light_speed.lore.0: When boots are equipped and you are in a space with light level 10 or above,
enchantment.addons.miniaturize.lore.0: Reduces body size by 10% when worn,
enchantment.addons.miniaturize.lore.1: full set reduces size by 40% total.
enchantment.addons.nimble.lore.0: Safe fall height increased by 10 ~ 30 blocks when equipped on elytra.
enchantment.addons.ore_refining.lore.0: Ores dropped after mining with a pickaxe are immediately smelted into ingots.
enchantment.addons.overclocking.lore.0: Tool block breaking speed increased by 20 ~ 100%.
Reduces damage received by 3% when worn,
but deducts experience proportional to the damage,
cannot trigger if experience is insufficient to offset damage,
full set reduces damage received by 12% total.
enchantment.addons.spear.lore.0: Axe entity interaction range increased by 1 ~ 3 blocks,
enchantment.addons.spear.lore.1: cannot trigger while under the weakness effect.
enchantment.addons.steady_sneak.lore.0: Reduces damage received by 10 ~ 20% while sneaking with leggings equipped,
enchantment.addons.steady_sneak.lore.1: movement speed is reduced by 60% while the effect is active,
enchantment.addons.steady_sneak.lore.2: cannot trigger while under the weakness effect.
enchantment.addons.stubborn.lore.0: Increases attack damage by 2 ~ 5 when chestplate health drops below 6.
enchantment.addons.wind_blast.lore.0: 20 ~ 100% chance to generate a windstorm when successfully blocking an attack with a shield.
enchantment.addons.wisdom.lore.0: Melee kills increase dropped experience by 10 ~ 50%,
enchantment.addons.wisdom.lore.1: Bosses are not affected by this effect.

plugins.airborne_warfare.airborne_warfar: All players parachute onto the map and battle each other, winning the championship within a constantly shrinking border!
All data is restored to pre-participation state after the event ends
Totem of Undying has a 60-second cooldown after use
Each team member shares 80 health points equally
Top three teams receive a designated number of raffle draws
Champion team receives bonus raffle draws based on team size (not applicable for solo)
Illegal teaming can be recorded and reported

plugins.assistive_features.assistive.aut: Hold a firework while wearing elytra.
Hold a non-firework item to wear armour.
Reel in when a fish bites.
Cast again upon rejoining the game.
Plant seeds after harvesting mature crops.
Take from inventory when item runs out.
Take from shulker boxes in inventory when item runs out.
Use the strongest weapon when attacking mobs.
Use the fastest tool when mining blocks.
plugins.assistive_features.assistive.dis: Remaining health bar appears above mobs.
plugins.assistive_features.assistive.do_: Prevents phantoms from spawning above you at night.

plugins.player_database.teleporting_know: Duplication bugs (TNT, strings) cannot be used!
The official community provides a very comprehensive newcomer's guide!
If someone in your team is in a vault, you cannot start a dungeon.
In the Magic Tower, only floors 3 and 5 are guaranteed to have an evacuation point!
Ask in global chat if you don't understand something, but don't spam!
Press numbers 1 ~ 9 in a territory to set group permissions!
Reach-extending, shooting through walls, and ore X-ray are all cheating!
Remember to open your quests and see what to do today~
If harassed, you can submit an anonymous report to @admin.
Some of the tips you see now were suggested by players!
Randomly sending rubbish to people you don't know is not okay!
Adding someone as a friend when you don't know them at all might seem odd.
Territory recovers 1 second of stamina every 5 seconds.
The server link in the ESC menu includes a seed code!
Don't quit when tackling the Magic Tower with teammates! It will cause the whole team to get stuck!
After playing for a while, remember to give your eyes a rest!
Points exceeding 3500 will not be carried over to the next season!
Too many ads? Try the ad-block feature!
Regular sign-in for 45 days earns you 330 CatCoins!
Remember to name important mobs, or they will disappear!
Territories cannot be recovered after deletion, unless you buy again.
Overworld structures refresh every 20 days.
Nether structures refresh every 10 days.
The End structures refresh every 5 days.
The auto-restock assist can take items out of shulker boxes!

plugins.rule_description.rule_agree: I agree to the terms of service
plugins.rule_description.rule_agree_agai: I confirm I agree to the terms of service
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.0.lor: Those who break the rules will be penalised!
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.1.lor:
Common examples:
Using hacks, scripts, building printers, or any unauthorised third-party software to gain an unfair advantage.
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.2: Money laundering or multi-accounting is prohibited
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.2.lor:
Common examples:
Using game mechanics or multiple accounts for large-scale money laundering, or using multiple accounts simultaneously to bypass restrictions or gain improper benefits.
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.3: Minors are present, do not send inappropriate content
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.3.lor:
Common examples:
Posting indecent, obscene, or pornographic words, images, or speech in any public channel (including text, signs, naming, etc.).
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.4: If it doesn't belong to you, leave it where it is
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.4.lor:
Common examples:
Stealing items from others' chests, farms, or any containers; destroying or modifying others' or public buildings without permission; maliciously triggering or interfering with others' redstone contraptions.
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.5: Look after yourself and do not anger others
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.5.lor:
Common examples:
Maliciously attacking, harming, or killing other players (except in PVP areas); provoking others by naming items, dumping rubbish, etc.; malicious harassment such as blocking others' Nether portals or trapping players.
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.6: Be respectful, friendly, and inclusive to keep the community clean
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.6.lor:
Common examples:
Spamming, arguing, publicly insulting, or using offensive language in public channels.
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.7: If you hate this environment, then leave it
plugins.rule_description.rule_page.7.lor: We welcome all players who can bring a positive influence to the community, and hope to jointly maintain a game environment worth loving.
